facebook.caption: Eco Lagoon is quietly earning its 4.9-star reputation on Phu Quoc, and it is not hard to see why. Tucked along Lê Bát, this resort hotel wraps guests in a lagoon-side setting that feels a world away from the busier strips of the island. With 173 reviews averaging near-perfect, it consistently delivers on comfort, nature, and that rare sense of calm. Practical tip: book directly with the resort to ask about room views, since lagoon-facing rooms are the ones guests rave about most.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the water catch the morning light at Eco Lagoon, where the lagoon is practically part of the room. These clips show exactly why guests keep returning, peaceful surroundings, lush greenery, and an atmosphere that makes you forget you even have a phone. This is Phu Quoc at its most unhurried.

instagram.caption: Eco Lagoon on Phu Quoc is scoring a 4.9 from 173 guests, and the lagoon setting at Lê Bát makes it very easy to understand. Calm, lush, and genuinely off the beaten path. Ask for a lagoon-view room when you book.
instagram.video_caption: Lagoon reflections, tropical greenery, and a silence you can actually feel. Eco Lagoon on Phu Quoc is giving 4.9-star energy in every single frame.

tiktok.caption: 4.9 stars and a lagoon view waiting for you at Eco Lagoon, Phu Quoc. This one is hard to scroll past. #EcoLagoon #PhuQuocTravel #VietnamResort #IslandVibes

scenes: Lê Bát, away from the crowds
